# genedai.md

> Gene Dai's personal homepage. Product builder and Co-Founder & CPO of OpenJobs AI.

## About Gene Dai

Gene Dai is a product builder based in California. He is the Co-Founder and Chief Product Officer (CPO) of OpenJobs AI, an autonomous AI recruiting platform that reached #1 on Product Hunt.

Previously, Gene led products at major Chinese tech companies:
- Head of Platform Product at Zuoyebang (China's largest K12 online education platform)
- Head of User Product at Liepin (6100.HK, executive recruitment platform)
- Product Director at Zhidemai Tech (300785.SZ, consumer content & commerce platform)
- Head of Community & Social Product and Head of Product of Kanzhun at BOSS Zhipin (BZ/2076.HK, China's leading mobile recruiting platform)
- Head of Product at Dora Tech (Sequoia Capital China backed)
- Product Partner & CPO at Feel (health & fitness app, ZhenFund backed)

Education: M.Eng. in Computer Software Engineering from Beihang University.

Areas of expertise: AI recruiting, product management, user growth, platform products, HRTech.

## Projects

- [Mira — AI Recruiter](https://www.openjobs-ai.com): End-to-end autonomous AI recruiter. Handles sourcing, screening, outreach, and interview scheduling.
- [OpenJobs Board](https://openjobs.genedai.me): Free, open-source job aggregator with 574+ positions across 422+ companies.
- [HireAI Directory](https://hireai.genedai.me): Curated directory of 149+ HR AI products organized by 5 technology eras.
- [Website2Markdown](https://md.genedai.me): URL-to-Markdown converter with 21 platform adapters built on Cloudflare Workers.
- [GeneDai CV](https://genedai.cv): AI-powered resume builder with 28+ professional templates.
- [Recruit Navigator](https://recruit.genedai.me): Recruitment tools directory with 300+ categories and 1,900+ resources.

## Writing

272+ articles published across Blog, Medium, and Substack. Topics include AI leader profiles, HRTech deep dives, recruiting AI, company analysis, and product strategy.
